article.title: Noizekid: Moombahton and Dancehall Production in Mexico
article.subtitle: A profile of the Mexican producer known for collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer whose work has gained recognition through collaborations with prominent artists and a distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent names in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His work is characterized by a fusion of electronic and dancehall elements, reflecting a contemporary approach to Latin-influenced production.
In collaboration with Barnation, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack,' which contains a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drum sounds used across his productions.
This release has provided producers with direct access to the sonic tools that define his style, further establishing his influence within the electronic music scene.
While his individual tracks and releases remain unindexed in mainstream databases, his contributions to the genre continue to resonate within club and festival circuits.
